summary: Deferred from MPI-64 SaveVideo session: two import-side video bugs (no prompt box on model-less imports; only first of N imports gets fps/duration). Log clean, no throw — separate subsystem from gen→save→mux.
Corrected invalid maturity 'todo' -> 'idea' (valid enum: idea/planned/in-progress/validating/complete). Two import bugs captured as an idea, not yet planned.
todo -> doing. Implementing Bug2 only (per-file fps/duration on multi-file import). Bug1 confirmed already fixed by user, dropped from scope.
doing -> done. Bug2 (per-file fps/duration on multi-video import) fixed in commit d12f526 + live-verified via /upload per-file probe. Bug1 already fixed prior, dropped from scope. User accepted.
